_doc: Project-aware probe corpus. Same prompt, expected results vary by project bank. Used to evaluate Tier 1 of the Hindsight integration (project-boost rule for Layer 0.5). Run with `bun src/eval/run-probes-project-aware.ts --ab`. The `expected_per_bank` map keys are bank IDs; values are skills that should rank in the top-3 for that bank. Skills under `__any__` are acceptable in any project bank as fallback. All skill names verified against ~/.agents/skills-index.json on 2026-04-26.
_status: v1 — 8 probes with real-skill expectations. Honest: a probe is allowed to fail on the global eval (no project context) and pass with project boost on. That's the whole point.

probes.rationale: Better Auth is the canonical auth-related skill family. `better-auth-complete` is the broad-fit umbrella; specific variants (security, ui, test-utils) cover narrower contexts.
`investigate` is the systematic debugging skill — flaky tests are debugging. e2e-testing is also a valid pull when Playwright is in scope.
Toolbelt-specific phrasing: 'suggester' should anchor to the skill management toolchain. gstack-plan-tune is a legitimate alternate read.
ship is the canonical deployment+CI skill. git-workflow covers the upstream pieces. Both should be reachable.
In the toolbelt this is about optimizing the L1 fastembed→Chroma path of the suggester itself. Outside the toolbelt this prompt is too vague to expect a specific match — `__any__` is empty by design.
In the toolbelt, hooks = OpenCode/Claude-Code lifecycle hooks; the canonical skill is creating-opencode-extensions. Elsewhere it could be a debugging starting point (investigate).

Project-aware: 'matcher' refers to the toolbelt's matcher.ts. The bank's `file:cli/src/lib/matcher.ts` tag plus skill-developer/skill-creator's domain should produce a hit. Outside the toolbelt the prompt is unanchored.

probes.prompt: what's slowing down the daemon startup
probes.rationale: Generic debugging prompt — investigate should always anchor it. Tests that the project boost doesn't drown legitimate broad matches.

scoring.method: Per probe, top-3 from suggester. Hit if any expected name (for the active bank, falling back to __any__) appears in top-3. Aggregate: hit rate per bank.
scoring.pass_condition: With HINDSIGHT_PROJECT_BOOST_ENABLED=1: mean per-bank hit rate >= 0.6 AND no probe regresses (a probe that hit baseline must also hit with-boost).
scoring.baseline: Run with the env flag unset for the pre-Hindsight baseline.
scoring.report_format: JSON: {bank, baseline: {hits, total, rate}, with_boost: {hits, total, rate}, regressions: [probe_ids]}
scoring.honest_note: Several probes are designed to fail the global eval and pass project-aware. Without project bank context, 'tune the suggester ranking' has no clear answer; with kh-::coding-toolbelt context, skill-developer should anchor.
